name: User names in description

input.title: User Profile Update
input.description: John Smith reported that the user profile page does not show the organization field. Jane Doe from HQ confirmed this is a bug. The fix adds the organization field to the profile card visible to Admin Williams and other administrators.

expectation: None of the PII terms should appear in the generated article output

name: Organization names and IDs in description

input.title: Editor Assignment
input.description: When assigning an Editor at Acme Corp (organization ID: ORG-2847), the administrator selects from a list of approved users. Testing was done at Globex Inc (ORG-1102) and Initech LLC (ORG-3391). Customer Alex Johnson (ID: C-99281) was used as a test case.

expectation: None of the organization names, IDs, or customer names should appear in the generated article output

name: Mixed PII in user stories

input.title: Customer Search Improvement
input.description: The customer search now supports partial name matching. Previously, searching for 'Garc' would not find 'Garcia, Miguel (C-44821)'. The improvement allows partial matches across first name, last name, and ID fields.

userStories.title: Partial name search by team lead Martinez
userStories.description: Team lead Martinez at the West Coast organization needs to find customer Garcia, Miguel quickly without typing the full name.

expectation: None of the PII terms should appear in the generated article output
